lock.setup_desc:
Set a password to protect your Telegram accounts.
You can skip this and configure it later in Settings.
lock.unlock_desc: Enter your application password to continue.
lock.error_too_short: Password must be at least 4 characters.

schedule.title: Schedule Setup
schedule.one_time_desc: Send once at the specified date and time.
schedule.daily_fixed_desc: Send every day at the specified time.
schedule.weekday_desc: Send on selected days of the week. Click the days below:
schedule.interval_desc: Repeat at a fixed interval. Set hours and minutes.
schedule.random_window_desc: Send at a random time within a daily window. Helps avoid FloodWait.
schedule.error_past_date: The selected time is in the past. Please choose a future time.
schedule.error_no_days: Please select at least one day of the week.
schedule.error_zero_interval: Interval must be greater than zero.
schedule.error_window_order: End time must be later than start time.

settings.remove_password_confirm: Password protection will be disabled. Continue?
settings.error_reencrypt: Failed to re-encrypt sessions. Check the log.

login.title: Add Account
login.api_desc:
API ID and API Hash are required.
1. Go to my.telegram.org and log in.
2. Open API development tools.
3. Fill out the form to create an app.
4. Copy and paste the credentials below.
login.phone_desc: Please confirm your country code and enter your phone number.
login.code_desc: We have sent a confirmation code to the Telegram app on your other device.
login.password_desc: This account is protected by an additional password.

messages.error_empty_title: Please provide a title for the message.
messages.delete_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This will also remove it from all assigned chats.
